$description: SundAI Motivation design tokens. Source of truth for app/globals.css (@theme) and any future surface (email, social, decks). Theme: light, locked.

paper.$description: Page ground. Warm cream, matches the photography grading.

ink.$description: Primary text. Off-black, never pure black.

ink-muted.$description: Secondary text. AA on paper and surface.

ink-faint.$description: Tertiary metadata only, never body copy.

teal-ink.$description: THE accent, interactive tier: links, buttons, labels. AA on paper/surface.

teal-bright.$description: Brand cyan, graphic tier only: aura arcs, progress bar, marks. Fails AA as text on paper; never use for copy.

teal-wash.$description: Tinted section band and content panels.

amber.$description: Heritage warm accent. Lives inside photography only; not a UI color.

container.$description: Max content width, px-5 mobile, px-8 desktop.

rules.$value: every animation must communicate hierarchy, storytelling, feedback, or state; all motion gated behind prefers-reduced-motion; animate transform and opacity only
